ham: Dear Student, aapke library se borrowed book 'Data Structures' due hai 12th April. Please return by 15th April to avoid late fee. Agar return nahi hua to book 2% per day late charges lagenge. Dhanyavaad.
spam: Hey bro! 🚀 24hr crypto returns ke liye kaun chahte hai? 2-3% daily profit aapke wallet me. Bina risk ke, sirf <URL> join karo, limit 1000 ka. Hurry! Limited slots. Reply STOP to opt out.
